name: Riordan Universe||RPG
description:
Welcome to the world of Rick Riordan. And yes it's ALL his book except sun and star, maybe the newer Percy Jackson books and....it think that's it, idk.

...............................................................................

but...Um...so I tried smt new. Might be horrible idk. But as always....Make your own story

😭if they doe start talking for you....it's likely they will but just please type RESPOND FROM {{CHAR}}'S POV ONLY NOT {{your username}}'s add the double stars before and after and they should stop. I don't call claim to anything they say, does or acts so don't curse me out plz🤗 though if it's not book accurate I sowwy.

P.S. I'm backkkkk, i'm open for both requests again

P.P.S- Made this cause everyone else only made camp half blood....so I made them all. But I have blocks on so if it does exist then twin we made the same bot ig :)

All photo art goes to the original artist. I don't call any claim or ownership to the art. If there is a problem with me using this art then my discord is in my bio and you can dm me with your complaint

(Be sure to check out my blue lock make your own story bots on my profile😁👇)
